description: Local Bloomberg tools for xbbg users.

lifecycle.reason: Missing required package metadata (runtimeHint not provided and registryType='mcpb' not in the inference table)

name: io.github.xbbg-org/xbbg-mcp

environmentVariables.description: Optional directory containing Bloomberg runtime libraries. Leave unset to use BLPAPI_ROOT, an authorized vendored SDK layout, or Python blpapi fallback.
environmentVariables.name: XBBG_MCP_LIB_DIR

environmentVariables.description: Bloomberg API host. Defaults to localhost.
environmentVariables.name: XBBG_MCP_HOST

environmentVariables.description: Bloomberg auth method: none, user, app, userapp, dir, manual, or token.
environmentVariables.name: XBBG_MCP_AUTH_METHOD

environmentVariables.description: Maximum rows returned to the MCP client per response. Defaults to 500.
environmentVariables.name: XBBG_MCP_MAX_ROWS

environmentVariables.description: Maximum characters per string value returned to the MCP client. Defaults to 2048.
environmentVariables.name: XBBG_MCP_MAX_STRING_CHARS

title: xbbg MCP
